user.title: PRE Distribuce – HDO
user.description: Select the command code of your HDO receiver. You can find it on the receiver label next to your meter (e.g. K1: 490) or in the Můj PRE portal.

data_description.cena_vt: Final price per kWh including distribution and VAT.
data_description.cena_nt: Final price per kWh including distribution and VAT.
data_description.power_sensor: If set, sensors with the current cost (CZK/h and CZK/min) are added.

error.cannot_connect: Could not load the command list from the PREdistribuce website.

abort.already_configured: This command code is already configured.

data_description.periods: Comma-separated minutes, e.g. 30, 90, 180. Each creates a sensor that is on only while the low tariff is running and will last at least that long – useful for starting appliances.
